scripts.build:web-app: rm -rf web-dist && tsc -p web/tsconfig.json && cp web/index.html web-dist/index.html && cp web/src/*.css web-dist/assets/
scripts.export:web: npm run build:web-app && rm -rf dist && expo export --platform web && cp dist/responsive-landing.html dist/index.html && mkdir -p dist/app && cp -R web-dist/. dist/app/
